name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES state, turn
N == 3   \* Number of processes

(* State variables *)
state == [p \in 1..N |-> idle]
turn == 1

(* Helper predicates *)
InCritical(p) == state[p] = critical
InTrying(p) == state[p] = trying
InIdle(p) == state[p] = idle

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == /\ state \in [1..N -> {idle, trying, critical}]
          /\ turn \in 1..N

(* Initialization *)
Init == /\ state = [p \in 1..N |-> idle]
        /\ turn = 1

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == \/ \E p \in 1..N : /\ state[p] = idle
                     /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = trying]
                     /\ turn' = turn
          \/ \E p \in 1..N : /\ state[p] = trying
                     /\ turn = p
                     /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = critical]
                     /\ turn' = turn
          \/ \E p \in 1..N : /\ state[p] = critical
                     /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = idle]
                     /\ turn' = (turn % N) + 1

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, turn>>

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Forks: a sequence of length N where each element is either 0 (free) or the index of the philosopher who holds it *)
(* States: a sequence of length N where each element is one of {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"} *)

(* Helper definitions *)
LEFT(i) == IF i = 0 THEN N - 1 ELSE i - 1
RIGHT(i) == IF i = N - 1 THEN 0 ELSE i + 1

(* Initial state: all forks are free, all philosophers are thinking *)
Init == /\ forks = [i \in 0..N-1 |-> 0]
        /\ states = [i \in 0..N-1 |-> "thinking"]

(* Action: philosopher i becomes hungry *)
Hungry(i) == /\ states[i] = "thinking"
           /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
           /\ forks' = forks

(* Action: philosopher i picks up both adjacent forks if they are free *)
PickUp(i) == /\ states[i] = "hungry"
           /\ forks[i] = 0
           /\ forks[LEFT(i)] = 0
           /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i, ![LEFT(i)] = i]
           /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]

(* Action: philosopher i puts down both adjacent forks *)
PutDown(i) == /\ states[i] = "eating"
           /\ forks[i] = i
           /\ forks[LEFT(i)] = i
           /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = 0, ![LEFT(i)] = 0]
           /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

(* Next action: either a philosopher becomes hungry or picks up forks or puts them down *)
Next == \E i \in 0..N-1 :
          (Hungry(i) \/ PickUp(i) \/ PutDown(i))

(* Type invariant: forks is a sequence of length N with elements in 0..N-1; states is a sequence of length N with elements in {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"} *)
TypeOK == /\ forks \in [0..N-1 -> 0..N-1]
          /\ states \in [0..N-1 -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]
          /\ \A i \in 0..N-1 : forks[i] = 0 \/ forks[i] = i

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y

VARIABLES num, flag, maxFlag, maxNum

Init == /\ num = 0
       /\ flag = 0
       /\ maxFlag = 0
       /\ maxNum = 0

Next == /\ num' = IF flag' THEN num ELSE num' + 1
       /\ flag' = IF flag THEN flag ELSE flag' + 1
       /\ maxNum' = IF maxFlag' THEN maxNum ELSE maxNum' + 1
       /\ maxFlag' = IF maxFlag THEN maxFlag ELSE maxFlag' + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag, maxFlag, maxNum>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES queue, producerBlocked, consumerBlocked

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == 
  /\ queue \in Seq(Int) /\ Len(queue) <= K
  /\ producerBlocked \in BOOLEAN
  /\ consumerBlocked \in BOOLEAN

(* Initial state *)
Init == 
  /\ queue = <<>>
  /\ producerBlocked = FALSE
  /\ consumerBlocked = FALSE

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == 
  (* Producer action *)
  \/ /\ Len(queue) < K
     /\ producerBlocked = FALSE
     /\ queue' = Append(queue, 1)  (* enqueue 1 *)
     /\ consumerBlocked' = consumerBlocked
  \/ /\ Len(queue) = K
     /\ producerBlocked = TRUE
     /\ queue' = queue
     /\ consumerBlocked' = consumerBlocked
  (* Consumer action *)
  \/ /\ Len(queue) > 0
     /\ consumerBlocked = FALSE
     /\ queue' = Tail(queue)  (* dequeue *)
     /\ producerBlocked' = producerBlocked
  \/ /\ Len(queue) = 0
     /\ consumerBlocked = TRUE
     /\ queue' = queue
     /\ producerBlocked' = producerBlocked

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<queue, producerBlocked, consumerBlocked>>

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = <<>> \\
        /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active' = FALSE \\
          /\ readers' = Append(readers, 1) \\
          /\ writer_active' = writer_active \\
        \/ /\ writer_active' = TRUE \\
          /\ readers' = <<>> \\
          /\ writer_active' = writer_active

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE
VARIABLES retransmit_count, sent_chunks, chunks, file

Init ==
    /\ file \in Seq(1..CHUNK_SIZE)
    /\ chunks = [i \in 1..Len(file) |-> file[i]]
    /\ sent_chunks = <<>>
    /\ retransmit_count = 0

Next ==
    /\ sent_chunks' = Append(sent_chunks, chunks[Len(sent_chunks) + 1])
    /\ retransmit_count' = retransmit_count + 1
    /\ UNCHANGED <<file, chunks>>

Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<file, chunks, sent_chunks, retransmit_count>>

name: Peterson's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Peterson2 ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES flag, turn

Init == /\ flag = [i \in 1..2 |-> FALSE]
        /\ turn = 1

Next == \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ turn' = turn
          /\ flag' = flag
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ turn' = 2
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = 1
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = turn
          /\ flag' = flag

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, turn>>

name: Simple Allocator
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MemoryAllocator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Pages, Clients

VARIABLE free, allocated

Init == /\ free = Pages
        /\ allocated = [c \in Clients |-> {}]

Next == /\ \E c \in Clients:
          /\ c \in free
          /\ free' = free \ {c}
          /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \cup {c}]
        \/ \E c \in Clients:
          /\ c \in allocated
          /\ free' = free \cup {c}
          /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \ {c}]

TypeOK == /\ free \subseteq Pages
          /\ \A c \in Clients: allocated[c] \subseteq Pages
          /\ \A c \in Clients: allocated[c] \subseteq free'

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>>

name: Dekker's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Dekker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES turn, wants

Init == /\ turn \in {0, 1}
        /\ wants \in {0, 1}^2
        /\ wants = [i \in {0, 1} |-> 0]

Next == \/ /\ turn' = 1 - turn
          /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![turn] = 1]
        \/ /\ turn' = turn
          /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![1 - turn] = 0]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, wants>>

TypeOK == /\ turn \in {0, 1}
          /\ wants \in {0, 1}^2
